nasb.text: Now the deeds of the flesh are evident, which are: immorality, impurity, sensuality,

esv.text: Now the works of the flesh are evident: sexual immorality, impurity, sensuality,

cnv.text: 肉體所行的都是顯而易見的，就如淫亂、污穢、邪蕩、

ccb.text: 顺从罪恶本性而行的事显而易见，如淫乱、污秽、邪荡、

csbs.text: 肉体的行为是清清楚楚的，它们就是：通奸、淫乱、污秽、好色、
